title.hi: विवाह एवं सम्बन्ध घटनाओं का समय

subtitle.en: Dasha triggers, double transits on the 7th house, delay indicators, and post-marriage predictions from the Navamsha
subtitle.hi: दशा प्रेरक, सप्तम भाव पर दोहरा गोचर, विलम्ब संकेतक, और नवांश से विवाहोत्तर भविष्यवाणियाँ
subtitle.ta: தசா தூண்டுதல்கள், 7ம் வீட்டில் இரட்டை கோசாரம், தாமத குறிகாட்டிகள் மற்றும் நவாம்சத்திலிருந்து திருமணத்திற்குப் பிந்தைய கணிப்புகள்
subtitle.te: దశ ట్రిగ్గర్లు, 7వ భావంపై డబుల్ ట్రాన్సిట్, ఆలస్య సూచకాలు మరియు నవాంశ నుండి వివాహానంతర అంచనాలు
subtitle.bn: দশা ট্রিগার, সপ্তম ভাবে দ্বৈত গোচর, বিলম্ব সূচক এবং নবাংশ থেকে বিবাহোত্তর ভবিষ্যদ্বাণী
subtitle.kn: ದಶಾ ಟ್ರಿಗ್ಗರ್‌ಗಳು, 7ನೇ ಭಾವದ ಮೇಲೆ ಡಬಲ್ ಟ್ರಾನ್ಸಿಟ್, ವಿಳಂಬ ಸೂಚಕಗಳು ಮತ್ತು ನವಾಂಶದಿಂದ ವಿವಾಹೋತ್ತರ ಭವಿಷ್ಯ
subtitle.mr: दशा प्रेरक, सप्तम भावावरील दोहरा गोचर, विलंब संकेतक आणि नवांशातून विवाहोत्तर भविष्य
subtitle.gu: દશા ટ્રિગર, 7મા ભાવ પર ડબલ ગોચર, વિલંબ સૂચક અને નવાંશથી લગ્ન પછીની આગાહીઓ
subtitle.mai: दशा प्रेरक, सप्तम भाव पर दोहरा गोचर, विलम्ब संकेतक, आ नवांश सँ विवाहोत्तर भविष्यवाणी

question.en: What is the strongest timing trigger for marriage in Vedic astrology?
question.hi: वैदिक ज्योतिष में विवाह के लिए सबसे शक्तिशाली समय प्रेरक क्या है?
question.ta: What is the strongest timing trigger for marriage in Vedic astrology?
question.te: What is the strongest timing trigger for marriage in Vedic astrology?
question.bn: What is the strongest timing trigger for marriage in Vedic astrology?
question.kn: What is the strongest timing trigger for marriage in Vedic astrology?
question.mr: वैदिक ज्योतिष में विवाह के लिए सबसे शक्तिशाली समय प्रेरक क्या है?
question.gu: What is the strongest timing trigger for marriage in Vedic astrology?
question.mai: वैदिक ज्योतिष मे विवाहक लेल सबसँ प्रबल समयक कारक की अछि?

explanation.en: The "double transit" (Jaimini principle) is the strongest marriage trigger: Jupiter AND Saturn both transiting over or aspecting the 7th house (from Moon or Lagna) simultaneously. Jupiter provides the opportunity/blessing, Saturn provides the commitment/formalization.
explanation.hi: दोहरा गोचर (जैमिनी सिद्धान्त) सबसे शक्तिशाली विवाह प्रेरक है: बृहस्पति और शनि दोनों एक साथ सप्तम भाव (चन्द्र या लग्न से) पर गोचर या दृष्टि डालते हुए। बृहस्पति अवसर/आशीर्वाद प्रदान करता है, शनि प्रतिबद्धता/औपचारिकीकरण प्रदान करता है।
explanation.ta: The "double transit" (Jaimini principle) is the strongest marriage trigger: Jupiter AND Saturn both transiting over or aspecting the 7th house (from Moon or Lagna) simultaneously. Jupiter provides the opportunity/blessing, Saturn provides the commitment/formalization.
explanation.te: The "double transit" (Jaimini principle) is the strongest marriage trigger: Jupiter AND Saturn both transiting over or aspecting the 7th house (from Moon or Lagna) simultaneously. Jupiter provides the opportunity/blessing, Saturn provides the commitment/formalization.
explanation.bn: The "double transit" (Jaimini principle) is the strongest marriage trigger: Jupiter AND Saturn both transiting over or aspecting the 7th house (from Moon or Lagna) simultaneously. Jupiter provides the opportunity/blessing, Saturn provides the commitment/formalization.
explanation.kn: The "double transit" (Jaimini principle) is the strongest marriage trigger: Jupiter AND Saturn both transiting over or aspecting the 7th house (from Moon or Lagna) simultaneously. Jupiter provides the opportunity/blessing, Saturn provides the commitment/formalization.
explanation.mr: दोहरा गोचर (जैमिनी सिद्धान्त) सबसे शक्तिशाली विवाह प्रेरक है: बृहस्पति और शनि दोनों एक साथ सप्तम भाव (चन्द्र या लग्न से) पर गोचर या दृष्टि डालते हुए। बृहस्पति अवसर/आशीर्वाद प्रदान करता है, शनि प्रतिबद्धता/औपचारिकीकरण प्रदान करता है।
explanation.gu: The "double transit" (Jaimini principle) is the strongest marriage trigger: Jupiter AND Saturn both transiting over or aspecting the 7th house (from Moon or Lagna) simultaneously. Jupiter provides the opportunity/blessing, Saturn provides the commitment/formalization.
explanation.mai: “दोहरा गोचर” (जैमिनी सिद्धांत) विवाहक सबसँ प्रबल कारक अछि: बृहस्पति आ शनि दुनू ७म भाव पर (चंद्रमा वा लग्न सँ) एकहि संग गोचर करैत वा दृष्टि दैत अछि। बृहस्पति अवसर/आशीर्वाद दैत अछि, शनि प्रतिबद्धता/औपचारिकता दैत अछि।

question.en: Which dasha period is most commonly associated with marriage timing?
question.hi: कौन-सा दशा काल विवाह के समय से सबसे अधिक सम्बद्ध है?
question.ta: Which dasha period is most commonly associated with marriage timing?
question.te: Which dasha period is most commonly associated with marriage timing?
question.bn: Which dasha period is most commonly associated with marriage timing?
question.kn: Which dasha period is most commonly associated with marriage timing?
question.mr: कौन-सा दशा काल विवाह के समय से सबसे अधिक सम्बद्ध है?
question.gu: Which dasha period is most commonly associated with marriage timing?
question.mai: विवाहक समय सँ कोन दशा काल सबसँ बेसी संबंधित अछि?

explanation.en: Marriage most commonly occurs during the dasha/antardasha of the 7th house lord, Venus (natural karaka of marriage), or the Navamsha lagna lord. The antardasha level is often the precise trigger  –  e.g., Venus Mahadasha, 7th lord Antardasha.
explanation.hi: विवाह सबसे सामान्यतः सप्तमेश, शुक्र (विवाह का नैसर्गिक कारक), या नवांश लग्नेश की दशा/अन्तर्दशा में होता है। अन्तर्दशा स्तर प्रायः सटीक प्रेरक होता है  –  उदा., शुक्र महादशा, सप्तमेश अन्तर्दशा।
explanation.ta: Marriage most commonly occurs during the dasha/antardasha of the 7th house lord, Venus (natural karaka of marriage), or the Navamsha lagna lord. The antardasha level is often the precise trigger  –  e.g., Venus Mahadasha, 7th lord Antardasha.
explanation.te: Marriage most commonly occurs during the dasha/antardasha of the 7th house lord, Venus (natural karaka of marriage), or the Navamsha lagna lord. The antardasha level is often the precise trigger  –  e.g., Venus Mahadasha, 7th lord Antardasha.
explanation.bn: Marriage most commonly occurs during the dasha/antardasha of the 7th house lord, Venus (natural karaka of marriage), or the Navamsha lagna lord. The antardasha level is often the precise trigger  –  e.g., Venus Mahadasha, 7th lord Antardasha.
explanation.kn: Marriage most commonly occurs during the dasha/antardasha of the 7th house lord, Venus (natural karaka of marriage), or the Navamsha lagna lord. The antardasha level is often the precise trigger  –  e.g., Venus Mahadasha, 7th lord Antardasha.
explanation.mr: विवाह सबसे सामान्यतः सप्तमेश, शुक्र (विवाह का नैसर्गिक कारक), या नवांश लग्नेश की दशा/अन्तर्दशा में होता है। अन्तर्दशा स्तर प्रायः सटीक प्रेरक होता है  –  उदा., शुक्र महादशा, सप्तमेश अन्तर्दशा।
explanation.gu: Marriage most commonly occurs during the dasha/antardasha of the 7th house lord, Venus (natural karaka of marriage), or the Navamsha lagna lord. The antardasha level is often the precise trigger  –  e.g., Venus Mahadasha, 7th lord Antardasha.
explanation.mai: विवाह प्रायः ७म भावक स्वामीक दशा/अंतर्दशा मे, शुक्र (विवाहक नैसर्गिक कारक), वा नवमांश लग्नक स्वामीक दशा/अंतर्दशा मे होइत अछि। अंतर्दशा स्तर प्रायः सटीक कारक होइत अछि – जेना, शुक्र महादशा, ७मेशक अंतर्दशा।

question.en: Jupiter transiting the 7th house from Moon is sufficient by itself to trigger marriage.
question.hi: चन्द्र से सप्तम भाव में बृहस्पति का गोचर स्वयं विवाह प्रेरित करने के लिए पर्याप्त है।
question.ta: Jupiter transiting the 7th house from Moon is sufficient by itself to trigger marriage.
question.te: Jupiter transiting the 7th house from Moon is sufficient by itself to trigger marriage.
question.bn: Jupiter transiting the 7th house from Moon is sufficient by itself to trigger marriage.
question.kn: Jupiter transiting the 7th house from Moon is sufficient by itself to trigger marriage.
question.mr: चन्द्र से सप्तम भाव में बृहस्पति का गोचर स्वयं विवाह प्रेरित करने के लिए पर्याप्त है।
question.gu: Jupiter transiting the 7th house from Moon is sufficient by itself to trigger marriage.
question.mai: चंद्रमा सँ ७म भाव मे बृहस्पति गोचर करैत अपने आप मे विवाहक लेल कारक बनय लेल पर्याप्त अछि।

explanation.en: False. Jupiter transit over the 7th is a favorable condition but rarely sufficient alone. Marriage timing requires alignment of multiple factors: the dasha must support it (7th lord or Venus period), AND the transit must confirm it (preferably double transit of Jupiter + Saturn on the 7th).
explanation.hi: असत्य। सप्तम पर बृहस्पति गोचर अनुकूल स्थिति है परन्तु अकेले शायद ही पर्याप्त हो। विवाह समय में अनेक कारकों का संरेखण आवश्यक है: दशा को समर्थन करना चाहिए (सप्तमेश या शुक्र काल), और गोचर को पुष्टि करनी चाहिए (अधिमानतः सप्तम पर बृहस्पति + शनि का दोहरा गोचर)।
explanation.ta: False. Jupiter transit over the 7th is a favorable condition but rarely sufficient alone. Marriage timing requires alignment of multiple factors: the dasha must support it (7th lord or Venus period), AND the transit must confirm it (preferably double transit of Jupiter + Saturn on the 7th).
explanation.te: False. Jupiter transit over the 7th is a favorable condition but rarely sufficient alone. Marriage timing requires alignment of multiple factors: the dasha must support it (7th lord or Venus period), AND the transit must confirm it (preferably double transit of Jupiter + Saturn on the 7th).
explanation.bn: False. Jupiter transit over the 7th is a favorable condition but rarely sufficient alone. Marriage timing requires alignment of multiple factors: the dasha must support it (7th lord or Venus period), AND the transit must confirm it (preferably double transit of Jupiter + Saturn on the 7th).
explanation.kn: False. Jupiter transit over the 7th is a favorable condition but rarely sufficient alone. Marriage timing requires alignment of multiple factors: the dasha must support it (7th lord or Venus period), AND the transit must confirm it (preferably double transit of Jupiter + Saturn on the 7th).
explanation.mr: असत्य। सप्तम पर बृहस्पति गोचर अनुकूल स्थिति है परन्तु अकेले शायद ही पर्याप्त हो। विवाह समय में अनेक कारकों का संरेखण आवश्यक है: दशा को समर्थन करना चाहिए (सप्तमेश या शुक्र काल), और गोचर को पुष्टि करनी चाहिए (अधिमानतः सप्तम पर बृहस्पति + शनि का दोहरा गोचर)।
explanation.gu: False. Jupiter transit over the 7th is a favorable condition but rarely sufficient alone. Marriage timing requires alignment of multiple factors: the dasha must support it (7th lord or Venus period), AND the transit must confirm it (preferably double transit of Jupiter + Saturn on the 7th).
explanation.mai: गलत। ७म पर बृहस्पति गोचर एकटा अनुकूल स्थिति अछि मुदा ई अकेले शायदिए पर्याप्त होइत अछि। विवाहक समयक लेल अनेक कारकक संरेखणक आवश्यकता होइत अछि: दशा एकर समर्थन करय (७मेश वा शुक्रक काल), आ गोचर एकर पुष्टि करय (अधिमानतः ७म पर बृहस्पति + शनि केर दोहरा गोचर)।

question.mai: ७म भाव मे राहु सामान्यतः संकेत करैत अछि:

explanation.en: Rahu in 7th typically delays marriage or brings an unconventional spouse  –  foreign-born, different religion/culture, significantly different age. The delay usually resolves when Rahu's dasha/transit clears or when the person enters a favorable 7th lord dasha.
explanation.hi: सप्तम में राहु सामान्यतः विवाह में विलम्ब करता है या अपारम्परिक जीवनसाथी लाता है  –  विदेशी, भिन्न धर्म/संस्कृति, महत्वपूर्ण आयु अन्तर। विलम्ब सामान्यतः तब समाप्त होता है जब राहु की दशा/गोचर स्पष्ट हो या व्यक्ति अनुकूल सप्तमेश दशा में प्रवेश करे।
explanation.ta: Rahu in 7th typically delays marriage or brings an unconventional spouse  –  foreign-born, different religion/culture, significantly different age. The delay usually resolves when Rahu's dasha/transit clears or when the person enters a favorable 7th lord dasha.
explanation.te: Rahu in 7th typically delays marriage or brings an unconventional spouse  –  foreign-born, different religion/culture, significantly different age. The delay usually resolves when Rahu's dasha/transit clears or when the person enters a favorable 7th lord dasha.
explanation.bn: Rahu in 7th typically delays marriage or brings an unconventional spouse  –  foreign-born, different religion/culture, significantly different age. The delay usually resolves when Rahu's dasha/transit clears or when the person enters a favorable 7th lord dasha.
explanation.kn: Rahu in 7th typically delays marriage or brings an unconventional spouse  –  foreign-born, different religion/culture, significantly different age. The delay usually resolves when Rahu's dasha/transit clears or when the person enters a favorable 7th lord dasha.
explanation.mr: सप्तम में राहु सामान्यतः विवाह में विलम्ब करता है या अपारम्परिक जीवनसाथी लाता है  –  विदेशी, भिन्न धर्म/संस्कृति, महत्वपूर्ण आयु अन्तर। विलम्ब सामान्यतः तब समाप्त होता है जब राहु की दशा/गोचर स्पष्ट हो या व्यक्ति अनुकूल सप्तमेश दशा में प्रवेश करे।
explanation.gu: Rahu in 7th typically delays marriage or brings an unconventional spouse  –  foreign-born, different religion/culture, significantly different age. The delay usually resolves when Rahu's dasha/transit clears or when the person enters a favorable 7th lord dasha.
explanation.mai: ७म मे राहु सामान्यतः विवाह मे देरी करैत अछि वा एकटा अपरंपरागत जीवनसाथी दैत अछि – विदेशी मूलक, भिन्न धर्म/संस्कृति, महत्वपूर्ण रूप सँ भिन्न आयु। देरी प्रायः तखन समाप्त होइत अछि जखन राहुक दशा/गोचर समाप्त होइत अछि वा जखन व्यक्ति अनुकूल ७मेशक दशा मे प्रवेश करैत अछि।

question.en: Saturn's aspect on or transit over the 7th house typically causes:
question.hi: सप्तम भाव पर शनि की दृष्टि या गोचर सामान्यतः कारण बनता है:
question.ta: Saturn's aspect on or transit over the 7th house typically causes:
question.te: Saturn's aspect on or transit over the 7th house typically causes:
question.bn: Saturn's aspect on or transit over the 7th house typically causes:
question.kn: Saturn's aspect on or transit over the 7th house typically causes:
question.mr: सप्तम भाव पर शनि की दृष्टि या गोचर सामान्यतः कारण बनता है:
question.gu: Saturn's aspect on or transit over the 7th house typically causes:
question.mai: शनि केर ७म भाव पर दृष्टि वा गोचर सामान्यतः एहि कारण सँ होइत अछि:

explanation.en: Saturn delays but does not deny. Its influence on the 7th house postpones marriage  –  often until late 20s or early 30s  –  but once marriage occurs under Saturn's influence, it tends to be stable and enduring. Saturn rewards patience and commitment.
explanation.hi: शनि विलम्ब करता है परन्तु इनकार नहीं करता। सप्तम भाव पर इसका प्रभाव विवाह को स्थगित करता है  –  प्रायः 20 के उत्तरार्ध या 30 के प्रारम्भ तक  –  परन्तु एक बार शनि के प्रभाव में विवाह होने पर, यह स्थिर और स्थायी होता है। शनि धैर्य और प्रतिबद्धता को पुरस्कृत करता है।
explanation.ta: Saturn delays but does not deny. Its influence on the 7th house postpones marriage  –  often until late 20s or early 30s  –  but once marriage occurs under Saturn's influence, it tends to be stable and enduring. Saturn rewards patience and commitment.
explanation.te: Saturn delays but does not deny. Its influence on the 7th house postpones marriage  –  often until late 20s or early 30s  –  but once marriage occurs under Saturn's influence, it tends to be stable and enduring. Saturn rewards patience and commitment.
explanation.bn: Saturn delays but does not deny. Its influence on the 7th house postpones marriage  –  often until late 20s or early 30s  –  but once marriage occurs under Saturn's influence, it tends to be stable and enduring. Saturn rewards patience and commitment.
explanation.kn: Saturn delays but does not deny. Its influence on the 7th house postpones marriage  –  often until late 20s or early 30s  –  but once marriage occurs under Saturn's influence, it tends to be stable and enduring. Saturn rewards patience and commitment.
explanation.mr: शनि विलम्ब करता है परन्तु इनकार नहीं करता। सप्तम भाव पर इसका प्रभाव विवाह को स्थगित करता है  –  प्रायः 20 के उत्तरार्ध या 30 के प्रारम्भ तक  –  परन्तु एक बार शनि के प्रभाव में विवाह होने पर, यह स्थिर और स्थायी होता है। शनि धैर्य और प्रतिबद्धता को पुरस्कृत करता है।
explanation.gu: Saturn delays but does not deny. Its influence on the 7th house postpones marriage  –  often until late 20s or early 30s  –  but once marriage occurs under Saturn's influence, it tends to be stable and enduring. Saturn rewards patience and commitment.
explanation.mai: शनि देरी करैत अछि मुदा मना नहि करैत अछि। ७म भाव पर एकर प्रभाव विवाह केँ स्थगित करैत अछि – प्रायः २० वर्षक अंत वा ३० वर्षक शुरुआत धरि – मुदा एक बेर शनि केर प्रभाव मे विवाह भऽ गेलाक बाद, ई स्थिर आ स्थायी होइत अछि। शनि धैर्य आ प्रतिबद्धता केँ पुरस्कृत करैत अछि।

question.en: The 7th lord placed in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house always prevents marriage entirely.
question.hi: षष्ठ, अष्टम, या द्वादश भाव में स्थित सप्तमेश सदैव विवाह को पूर्णतया रोकता है।
question.ta: The 7th lord placed in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house always prevents marriage entirely.
question.te: The 7th lord placed in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house always prevents marriage entirely.
question.bn: The 7th lord placed in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house always prevents marriage entirely.
question.kn: The 7th lord placed in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house always prevents marriage entirely.
question.mr: षष्ठ, अष्टम, या द्वादश भाव में स्थित सप्तमेश सदैव विवाह को पूर्णतया रोकता है।
question.gu: The 7th lord placed in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house always prevents marriage entirely.
question.mai: ७मेश ६म, ८म वा १२म भाव मे बैसल हमेशा विवाह केँ पूर्ण रूप सँ रोकैत अछि।

explanation.en: False. The 7th lord in dusthana (6, 8, 12) delays marriage and creates challenges in partnerships, but does not prevent it entirely. The marriage timing window shifts later, and the person may face obstacles or unconventional circumstances, but marriage remains possible especially during the 7th lord's own dasha period.
explanation.hi: असत्य। दुःस्थान (6, 8, 12) में सप्तमेश विवाह में विलम्ब करता है और साझेदारी में चुनौतियाँ उत्पन्न करता है, परन्तु इसे पूर्णतया नहीं रोकता। विवाह समय खिड़की बाद में खिसकती है, और व्यक्ति को बाधाओं या अपारम्परिक परिस्थितियों का सामना हो सकता है, परन्तु विवाह सम्भव रहता है विशेषकर सप्तमेश की स्वयं की दशा काल में।
explanation.ta: False. The 7th lord in dusthana (6, 8, 12) delays marriage and creates challenges in partnerships, but does not prevent it entirely. The marriage timing window shifts later, and the person may face obstacles or unconventional circumstances, but marriage remains possible especially during the 7th lord's own dasha period.
explanation.te: False. The 7th lord in dusthana (6, 8, 12) delays marriage and creates challenges in partnerships, but does not prevent it entirely. The marriage timing window shifts later, and the person may face obstacles or unconventional circumstances, but marriage remains possible especially during the 7th lord's own dasha period.
explanation.bn: False. The 7th lord in dusthana (6, 8, 12) delays marriage and creates challenges in partnerships, but does not prevent it entirely. The marriage timing window shifts later, and the person may face obstacles or unconventional circumstances, but marriage remains possible especially during the 7th lord's own dasha period.
explanation.kn: False. The 7th lord in dusthana (6, 8, 12) delays marriage and creates challenges in partnerships, but does not prevent it entirely. The marriage timing window shifts later, and the person may face obstacles or unconventional circumstances, but marriage remains possible especially during the 7th lord's own dasha period.
explanation.mr: असत्य। दुःस्थान (6, 8, 12) में सप्तमेश विवाह में विलम्ब करता है और साझेदारी में चुनौतियाँ उत्पन्न करता है, परन्तु इसे पूर्णतया नहीं रोकता। विवाह समय खिड़की बाद में खिसकती है, और व्यक्ति को बाधाओं या अपारम्परिक परिस्थितियों का सामना हो सकता है, परन्तु विवाह सम्भव रहता है विशेषकर सप्तमेश की स्वयं की दशा काल में।
explanation.gu: False. The 7th lord in dusthana (6, 8, 12) delays marriage and creates challenges in partnerships, but does not prevent it entirely. The marriage timing window shifts later, and the person may face obstacles or unconventional circumstances, but marriage remains possible especially during the 7th lord's own dasha period.
explanation.mai: गलत। दुष्टस्थान (६, ८, १२) मे ७मेश विवाह मे देरी करैत अछि आ साझेदारी मे चुनौती उत्पन्न करैत अछि, मुदा एकरा पूर्ण रूप सँ नहि रोकैत अछि। विवाहक समयक अवधि पाछू खसक जाइत अछि, आ व्यक्ति केँ बाधा वा अपरंपरागत परिस्थिति केँ सामना करय पड़ि सकैत अछि, मुदा विवाह संभव रहैत अछि, विशेष रूप सँ ७मेशक अपन दशा काल मे।

question.en: Which divisional chart is primarily used to assess spouse personality and marriage quality?
question.hi: जीवनसाथी के व्यक्तित्व और विवाह गुणवत्ता का आकलन करने के लिए मुख्य रूप से कौन-सी वर्ग कुण्डली उपयोग की जाती है?
question.ta: Which divisional chart is primarily used to assess spouse personality and marriage quality?
question.te: Which divisional chart is primarily used to assess spouse personality and marriage quality?
question.bn: Which divisional chart is primarily used to assess spouse personality and marriage quality?
question.kn: Which divisional chart is primarily used to assess spouse personality and marriage quality?
question.mr: जीवनसाथी के व्यक्तित्व और विवाह गुणवत्ता का आकलन करने के लिए मुख्य रूप से कौन-सी वर्ग कुण्डली उपयोग की जाती है?
question.gu: Which divisional chart is primarily used to assess spouse personality and marriage quality?
question.mai: जीवनसाथीक व्यक्तित्व आ विवाहक गुणवत्ताक मूल्यांकन करय लेल मुख्य रूप सँ कोन वर्ग कुंडलीक उपयोग कएल जाइत अछि?

explanation.en: The Navamsha (D-9) is the "marriage and dharma" chart. It reveals the spouse's personality, the quality of the marriage bond, and the native's spiritual path. The 7th house of the Navamsha, its lord, and Venus placement in D-9 are key indicators of marital quality.
explanation.hi: नवांश (डी-9) "विवाह और धर्म" कुण्डली है। यह जीवनसाथी का व्यक्तित्व, विवाह बन्धन की गुणवत्ता, और जातक का आध्यात्मिक पथ प्रकट करता है। नवांश का सप्तम भाव, उसका स्वामी, और डी-9 में शुक्र स्थिति वैवाहिक गुणवत्ता के प्रमुख संकेतक हैं।
explanation.ta: The Navamsha (D-9) is the "marriage and dharma" chart. It reveals the spouse's personality, the quality of the marriage bond, and the native's spiritual path. The 7th house of the Navamsha, its lord, and Venus placement in D-9 are key indicators of marital quality.
explanation.te: The Navamsha (D-9) is the "marriage and dharma" chart. It reveals the spouse's personality, the quality of the marriage bond, and the native's spiritual path. The 7th house of the Navamsha, its lord, and Venus placement in D-9 are key indicators of marital quality.
explanation.bn: The Navamsha (D-9) is the "marriage and dharma" chart. It reveals the spouse's personality, the quality of the marriage bond, and the native's spiritual path. The 7th house of the Navamsha, its lord, and Venus placement in D-9 are key indicators of marital quality.
explanation.kn: The Navamsha (D-9) is the "marriage and dharma" chart. It reveals the spouse's personality, the quality of the marriage bond, and the native's spiritual path. The 7th house of the Navamsha, its lord, and Venus placement in D-9 are key indicators of marital quality.
explanation.mr: नवांश (डी-9) "विवाह और धर्म" कुण्डली है। यह जीवनसाथी का व्यक्तित्व, विवाह बन्धन की गुणवत्ता, और जातक का आध्यात्मिक पथ प्रकट करता है। नवांश का सप्तम भाव, उसका स्वामी, और डी-9 में शुक्र स्थिति वैवाहिक गुणवत्ता के प्रमुख संकेतक हैं।
explanation.gu: The Navamsha (D-9) is the "marriage and dharma" chart. It reveals the spouse's personality, the quality of the marriage bond, and the native's spiritual path. The 7th house of the Navamsha, its lord, and Venus placement in D-9 are key indicators of marital quality.
explanation.mai: नवमांश (D-९) "विवाह आ धर्म" कुंडली अछि। ई जीवनसाथीक व्यक्तित्व केँ, विवाह संबंधक गुणवत्ता केँ, आ जातकक आध्यात्मिक मार्ग केँ प्रकट करैत अछि। नवमांशक ७म भाव, एकर स्वामी, आ D-९ मे शुक्रक स्थिति वैवाहिक गुणवत्ताक प्रमुख संकेतक अछि।

question.en: Which house governs children timing in the birth chart?
question.hi: जन्म कुण्डली में सन्तान के समय का शासन कौन-सा भाव करता है?
question.ta: Which house governs children timing in the birth chart?
question.te: Which house governs children timing in the birth chart?
question.bn: Which house governs children timing in the birth chart?
question.kn: Which house governs children timing in the birth chart?
question.mr: जन्म कुण्डली में सन्तान के समय का शासन कौन-सा भाव करता है?
question.gu: Which house governs children timing in the birth chart?
question.mai: जन्म कुंडली मे संतानक समय केँ कोन भाव नियंत्रित करैत अछि?

explanation.en: The 5th house (Putra Bhava) governs children, creative expression, and romance. Children timing is assessed through the 5th lord dasha, Jupiter transit over the 5th, and the Saptamsha (D-7) divisional chart. The 2nd house (family) is secondary  –  it shows family expansion.
explanation.hi: पंचम भाव (पुत्र भाव) सन्तान, सृजनात्मक अभिव्यक्ति, और प्रेम का शासन करता है। सन्तान समय का आकलन पंचमेश दशा, पंचम पर बृहस्पति गोचर, और सप्तमांश (डी-7) वर्ग कुण्डली द्वारा किया जाता है। द्वितीय भाव (परिवार) गौण है  –  यह परिवार विस्तार दर्शाता है।
explanation.ta: The 5th house (Putra Bhava) governs children, creative expression, and romance. Children timing is assessed through the 5th lord dasha, Jupiter transit over the 5th, and the Saptamsha (D-7) divisional chart. The 2nd house (family) is secondary  –  it shows family expansion.
explanation.te: The 5th house (Putra Bhava) governs children, creative expression, and romance. Children timing is assessed through the 5th lord dasha, Jupiter transit over the 5th, and the Saptamsha (D-7) divisional chart. The 2nd house (family) is secondary  –  it shows family expansion.
explanation.bn: The 5th house (Putra Bhava) governs children, creative expression, and romance. Children timing is assessed through the 5th lord dasha, Jupiter transit over the 5th, and the Saptamsha (D-7) divisional chart. The 2nd house (family) is secondary  –  it shows family expansion.
explanation.kn: The 5th house (Putra Bhava) governs children, creative expression, and romance. Children timing is assessed through the 5th lord dasha, Jupiter transit over the 5th, and the Saptamsha (D-7) divisional chart. The 2nd house (family) is secondary  –  it shows family expansion.
explanation.mr: पंचम भाव (पुत्र भाव) सन्तान, सृजनात्मक अभिव्यक्ति, और प्रेम का शासन करता है। सन्तान समय का आकलन पंचमेश दशा, पंचम पर बृहस्पति गोचर, और सप्तमांश (डी-7) वर्ग कुण्डली द्वारा किया जाता है। द्वितीय भाव (परिवार) गौण है  –  यह परिवार विस्तार दर्शाता है।
explanation.gu: The 5th house (Putra Bhava) governs children, creative expression, and romance. Children timing is assessed through the 5th lord dasha, Jupiter transit over the 5th, and the Saptamsha (D-7) divisional chart. The 2nd house (family) is secondary  –  it shows family expansion.
explanation.mai: ५म भाव (पुत्र भाव) संतान, रचनात्मक अभिव्यक्ति, आ प्रेम केँ नियंत्रित करैत अछि। संतानक समयक मूल्यांकन ५मेशक दशा, ५म पर बृहस्पति गोचर, आ सप्तमांश (D-७) वर्ग कुंडलीक माध्यम सँ कएल जाइत अछि। २म भाव (परिवार) गौण अछि – ई परिवारक विस्तार केँ देखाबैत अछि।

question.en: Saturn transit over natal Venus always causes divorce or separation.
question.hi: जन्मकालिक शुक्र पर शनि गोचर सदैव तलाक या वियोग का कारण बनता है।
question.ta: Saturn transit over natal Venus always causes divorce or separation.
question.te: Saturn transit over natal Venus always causes divorce or separation.
question.bn: Saturn transit over natal Venus always causes divorce or separation.
question.kn: Saturn transit over natal Venus always causes divorce or separation.
question.mr: जन्मकालिक शुक्र पर शनि गोचर सदैव तलाक या वियोग का कारण बनता है।
question.gu: Saturn transit over natal Venus always causes divorce or separation.
question.mai: जन्मक शुक्र पर शनि गोचर हमेशा तलाक वा अलगाव केँ कारण बनैत अछि।

explanation.en: False. Saturn transit over Venus creates a testing period for relationships  –  emotional distance, practical concerns overshadowing romance, or a reality check on the partnership. It can strengthen a solid marriage by forcing necessary conversations. Only in already-fragile relationships does it sometimes tip toward separation.
explanation.hi: असत्य। शुक्र पर शनि गोचर सम्बन्धों के लिए परीक्षा काल बनाता है  –  भावनात्मक दूरी, रोमांस पर व्यावहारिक चिन्ताओं का प्रभुत्व, या साझेदारी की वास्तविकता जाँच। यह आवश्यक संवादों को मजबूर कर ठोस विवाह को मजबूत कर सकता है। केवल पहले से नाजुक सम्बन्धों में यह कभी-कभी विच्छेद की ओर झुकता है।
explanation.ta: False. Saturn transit over Venus creates a testing period for relationships  –  emotional distance, practical concerns overshadowing romance, or a reality check on the partnership. It can strengthen a solid marriage by forcing necessary conversations. Only in already-fragile relationships does it sometimes tip toward separation.
explanation.te: False. Saturn transit over Venus creates a testing period for relationships  –  emotional distance, practical concerns overshadowing romance, or a reality check on the partnership. It can strengthen a solid marriage by forcing necessary conversations. Only in already-fragile relationships does it sometimes tip toward separation.

It can strengthen a solid marriage by forcing necessary conversations. Only in already-fragile relationships does it sometimes tip toward separation.

explanation.gu: False. Saturn transit over Venus creates a testing period for relationships  –  emotional distance, practical concerns overshadowing romance, or a reality check on the partnership. It can strengthen a solid marriage by forcing necessary conversations. Only in already-fragile relationships does it sometimes tip toward separation.
explanation.mai: गलत। शुक्र पर शनि गोचर संबंधक लेल एकटा परीक्षण काल उत्पन्न करैत अछि – भावनात्मक दूरी, प्रेम पर व्यावहारिक चिंताक हावी होबय, वा साझेदारी पर एकटा वास्तविकताक जाँच। ई आवश्यक बातचीत केँ मजबूर कऽ कऽ एकटा मजबूत विवाह केँ मजबूत कऽ सकैत अछि। मात्र पहिने सँ कमजोर संबंध मे ई कहियो-कहलियो अलगाव दिस झुकैत अछि।

question.en: What is a "challenging period" in an existing marriage per Jyotish?
question.hi: ज्योतिष के अनुसार विद्यमान विवाह में "चुनौतीपूर्ण काल" क्या है?
question.ta: What is a "challenging period" in an existing marriage per Jyotish?
question.te: What is a "challenging period" in an existing marriage per Jyotish?
question.bn: What is a "challenging period" in an existing marriage per Jyotish?
question.kn: What is a "challenging period" in an existing marriage per Jyotish?
question.mr: ज्योतिष के अनुसार विद्यमान विवाह में "चुनौतीपूर्ण काल" क्या है?
question.gu: What is a "challenging period" in an existing marriage per Jyotish?
question.mai: ज्योतिषक अनुसार वर्तमान विवाह मे एकटा "चुनौतीपूर्ण काल" की अछि?

explanation.en: The 7th lord running through a dusthana (6th = conflicts, 8th = crises, 12th = separation) in its dasha, or Saturn transiting over natal Venus or the 7th house cusp, creates periods of marital stress. These are testing periods, not death sentences  –  awareness and remedies help navigate them.
explanation.hi: दुःस्थान (षष्ठ = संघर्ष, अष्टम = संकट, द्वादश = वियोग) में दशा काल में सप्तमेश, या जन्मकालिक शुक्र या सप्तम भाव संधि पर शनि गोचर, वैवाहिक तनाव के काल बनाते हैं। ये परीक्षा काल हैं, मृत्युदण्ड नहीं  –  जागरूकता और उपाय इनसे मार्गदर्शन में सहायक हैं।

explanation.gu: The 7th lord running through a dusthana (6th = conflicts, 8th = crises, 12th = separation) in its dasha, or Saturn transiting over natal Venus or the 7th house cusp, creates periods of marital stress. These are testing periods, not death sentences  –  awareness and remedies help navigate them.
explanation.mai: ७मेश अपन दशा मे दुष्टस्थान (६म = संघर्ष, ८म = संकट, १२म = अलगाव) सँ गुजरैत, वा शनि जन्मक शुक्र वा ७म भावक संधि पर गोचर करैत, वैवाहिक तनावक काल उत्पन्न करैत अछि। ई परीक्षण काल अछि, मृत्युदंड नहि – जागरूकता आ उपाय एहि सँ निपटय मे मदद करैत अछि।
